response.justification: Bogdan possesses an exceptional technical background that perfectly aligns with both the required and nice-to-have skills, including TypeScript, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM integrations. However, as a Staff/Senior Engineer with over 15 years of experience, he is vastly overqualified for this Entry/Junior-level position, raising significant concerns about salary expectations and long-term role satisfaction unless the company is willing to up-level the position.
strengths: Extensive expertise in the core tech stack, including TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Strong hands-on experience with nice-to-have requirements like AWS, Kubernetes, and LLMs.
Deep knowledge of clean software architecture, TDD, and CI/CD practices.
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level role, currently holding a Staff Software Engineer title.
Likely to have salary and responsibility expectations far exceeding a junior position budget.
The role requires high on-site presence, which may be a blocker if the company office is not located in Berlin.
